patch.description: Contract endpoint (10.7). Updates stock for product at outlet. Creates audit log and updates atomically. Stock is outlet-scoped - outletId is required.

post.description:
Two-phase creation process:
      1. Validates clientGeneratedId for idempotency (returns 200 if exists)
      2. Checks stock for all items (returns 409 if insufficient and no override)
      3. Validates override flags against deficit threshold (returns 403 if blocked)
      4. Locks abbreviations on first invoice (auto)
      5. Creates invoice atomically with stock deduction, audit logs, and deficits
     
      Retry with override=true in individual items to retry after 409 response.

200.description: Invoice already exists (idempotent replay). Returns existing invoice.

201.description: Invoice created successfully. Stock decremented, audit logged, abbreviations locked if first invoice.

400.description: Invalid input (missing items, duplicate product IDs, etc.)

403.description: Override blocked because deficit threshold exceeded for those items.

409.description: Stock insufficient for some items. Review insufficientItems and retry with override=true flags.

get.description: Retrieve invoices with optional filters (date range, payment method, GST status, outlet, product search). Default pagination: 20 per page.

parameters.name: paymentMethod
parameters.description: Filter by payment method (CASH, CARD, UPI, CHEQUE, BANK_TRANSFER)

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Filter by product ID in invoice items

200.description: Paginated list of invoices matching filters

get.summary: Get invoices with filters and pagination

200.description: Invoice details with all snapshots and deficit status

delete.description: Marks invoice as deleted without removing from database

get.description: Check if the service is running (for Kubernetes liveness probe)
Check if the service is ready to accept requests (for Kubernetes readiness probe)
Get detailed health status including uptime and version

email.description: Email address for the new tenant

password.description: Secure password (minimum 8 characters, must contain letter and number)

token.description: Password reset token received via email

gstEnabled.description: Whether GST is enabled for this tenant
Whether GST is enabled for this tenant

businessAbbr.description: Business abbreviation (3-6 uppercase alphanumeric characters, locked after first invoice)

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default outlet
Whether this is the default outlet
Whether this is the default outlet

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, letter + number required)

skipped.description: Number of rows skipped due to validation errors

errors.description: Array of skipped rows with error details

importedAt.description: Timestamp of when the import was processed

template.description: CSV template content showing column structure and examples
template.example:
name,price,gst_rate,opening_stock,deficit_threshold
Laptop Computer,99999.99,18,100,5
Office Chair,5999.99,18,50,3
USB Cable,299.99,18,200,10

instructions.description: Detailed instructions for CSV format and constraints
instructions.example: Required columns: name, price, gst_rate. Optional: opening_stock (default 0), deficit_threshold (default 10). Constraints: name max 200 chars, price positive with max 2 decimals, gst_rate one of [0,5,12,18,28], file size max 5 MB, max 1000 rows, opening_stock must be integer >= 0, deficit_threshold must be integer >= 1.

quantity.description: Quantity of stock being added to resolve deficit

clientGeneratedId.description: Client-generated unique invoice identifier (UUID for idempotency)

items.description: Array of invoice line items (at least 1 required)

gstEnabled.description: Override tenant GST setting for this invoice

unitPrice.description: Unit price snapshot at time of sale

message.example: Override blocked because deficit threshold exceeded.

overrideBlockReason.description: Reason why override cannot be applied

message.example: Stock insufficient for some items. Review and retry with override flag.
